parameters.text:
You are an agent that received a massive input document.

Input size: 15,000 tokens
Model context limit: 8,000 tokens
Overflow: 7,000 tokens (87.5% over limit!)

The input was TRUNCATED. You only see the first 8,000 tokens.
Critical information at the end of the document is LOST.

Output: {"agent": "document_processor", "input_tokens": 15000, "context_limit": 8000, "tokens_lost": 7000, "overflow_percent": 87.5, "data_loss": "critical_info_at_end_lost"}

meta.description: Input document exceeds context window, causing truncation and data loss
